title: Takhir i Zukhra
actors: Yuldus Rysayeva, Gulyam Aglayev, Asad Ismatov
plot: Shot in Uzbekistan during WWII, Takhir (Aglayev) is betrothed to Zukhra (Rysayeva) on their birth days by her father, Babakhan (Ismatov). They grow up together in the Kahn's palace, but at age 12, Takhir's father chooses to help t...
